## Discussion
The association was significant (*P* = .003) and consistent across cohorts. The assay
was validated *in vitro* and confirmed *in vivo*; the *BRCA1* variant carriers showed a
higher event rate. Sensitivity analyses using *t* tests gave concordant results, and the
effect held after adjustment. These findings support the pre-specified hypothesis and
align with prior reports in comparable screening populations without overstating scope.
